prompt: Create a realistic vertical fashion portrait photo of a young East Asian woman standing outdoors near the seaside at golden hour, framed from head to upper thighs and centered in the composition. She has long voluminous wavy dark brown hair blowing slightly in the wind, smooth natural makeup, a calm confident expression, and wears narrow black oval sunglasses plus large thin hoop earrings. Outfit: a dark charcoal ribbed cropped tank top with lace-trim straps and neckline, revealing the midriff, paired with low-rise dark olive cargo-style pants; one hand rests in a pocket while the other hangs naturally by her thigh. Background: sunset sky with warm orange clouds, distant water and low mountains on the left, a wooden fence and dense green shrubs in the foreground, and a large gray metal lattice tower structure rising behind her on the right. Lighting should be cinematic backlit sunset with warm rim light on hair and shoulders, soft natural shadows on the face, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, high-end editorial street-fashion photography, 35mm lens look, natural colors, no text, no watermark, no extra people in the foreground.
promptEn: Create a realistic vertical fashion portrait photo of a young East Asian woman standing outdoors near the seaside at golden hour, framed from head to upper thighs and centered in the composition. promptZh: 创作一张写实风格的竖构图时尚人像照片，主体为 一位年轻的东亚女性，她站在海边户外，取景范围从头部到大腿上部，主体居中。她留着一头浓密且微卷的深棕色长发，在风中轻轻飘动，妆容自然精致，神情沉稳自信，佩戴着黑色窄框椭圆形太阳镜和大型细圈耳环。服装：一件深炭灰色罗纹短款背心，带有蕾丝边饰的肩带和领口，露出腰部，搭配低腰深橄榄色工装裤；一只手插在口袋里，另一只手自然垂在大腿旁。背景：日落天空呈现暖橙色云彩，左侧可见远处的海水和低矮山脉，前景有木栅栏和茂密的绿色灌木丛，右后方矗立着一座大型灰色金属格栅塔结构。光影应为电影感的日落逆光，头发和肩部带有温暖的轮廓光，面部有柔和的自然阴影，浅景深，写实皮肤质感，高端街头时尚摄影风格，35mm 镜头质感，色彩自然，无文字，无水印，前景中无其他人物。
